subject: Kindergarten enrollment paperwork — what forms do I need?
description: My daughter turns 5 in September and I need to know which forms to submit for kindergarten enrollment at Maplewood Elementary. The district website is a bit confusing.

subject: Bus route change — Route 14 no longer stops at Elm & Pine
description: Starting this week our stop at Elm and Pine is gone. My son has to walk an extra half mile with no sidewalk. We need an explanation and a fix.

subject: Lunch account balance keeps dropping faster than expected
description: I added $40 to my kid's lunch account two weeks ago and the balance is already at $6. I don't think the charges are right — can someone audit the transaction history?

subject: Cannot log into ParentPortal — password reset not arriving
description: I've clicked 'Forgot Password' three times today and I'm not getting the reset email. I need access to view my child's grades before parent-teacher conferences.

subject: School calendar — is November 27 a student day or holiday?
description: The printed calendar we received at back-to-school night shows November 27 as a regular school day but the district website says it's a holiday. Which is correct?

subject: Immunization records — where do I upload my child's shot records?
description: We just moved from out of state and need to submit updated immunization records for our 3rd grader. I can't find the upload link in the enrollment portal.

subject: Free and reduced lunch application — still pending after 3 weeks
description: I submitted a free and reduced price meal application on October 1st and still haven't heard back. My child is currently being charged full price every day.

subject: Field trip permission slip — can I submit it online?
description: My daughter's class is going to the science museum on November 15 and the teacher sent home a paper permission slip. Is there a way to do this online through the portal?

subject: Attendance excuse — how do I submit one for yesterday's absence?
description: My son was sick yesterday and I forgot to call the attendance line. How do I submit a written excuse after the fact? I don't want it to count as unexcused.

subject: Report card not visible in ParentPortal
description: Quarter 1 report cards were supposed to be released today but I don't see anything in the portal. Other parents in the group chat say they can see theirs.

subject: IEP meeting scheduling — no one has called us back
description: We requested an IEP review meeting for our son two weeks ago and still haven't received a call or email to schedule it. His current plan expires next month.

subject: Library book fine — charged $12 for a book we returned
description: My daughter returned a library book on October 31st but her account shows a $12 overdue fine. She has the date-stamp slip from the library drop box.

subject: Locker assignment — my son never received one
description: School started two months ago and my 6th grader still doesn't have a locker. He's been carrying everything in his backpack all year. Who do I contact?

subject: Transfer request — moving to Ridgeview attendance zone mid-year
description: We moved in December and are now in the Ridgeview Middle School zone. What is the process for transferring my daughter mid-year? Do I need to re-enroll completely?

subject: After-school program registration — site says session is full
description: I tried to register my son for the spring after-school STEM program but the portal says the session is full. Is there a waitlist? He's been doing this program for two years.

subject: Summer school enrollment — deadline and eligibility question
description: My daughter's teacher mentioned she might benefit from summer school math. What is the enrollment deadline and does she need a teacher referral or can I sign her up directly?

subject: Bus stop change request — new home address after move
description: We moved two streets over last weekend. I need our bus stop updated to the one at Oak Ave and 5th Street for Route 9. Our current stop is no longer walkable from the new address.

subject: Chromebook checkout — device not powering on
description: The district-issued Chromebook my son checked out last month won't turn on at all. We've tried different chargers. He has a big project due Friday and needs a working device.

subject: Spirit week schedule — dates and themes not posted yet
description: Spirit week is supposedly next week but the school website and the portal both still say 'TBD' for dates and themes. Other parents are asking me and I have no idea. Can someone post this?

subject: Volunteer background check — application status unclear
description: I submitted my volunteer background check paperwork six weeks ago and still don't know if I've been cleared. I want to help with the spring carnival but the deadline is next week.

subject: ParentPortal two-factor auth locked me out of my account
description: The portal is now asking for a verification code sent to my old phone number that I no longer have. I need to update my contact number and regain access.

subject: Enrollment paperwork for incoming 9th grader — Cedar Bluff HS
description: My son is finishing 8th grade at Ridgeview and will be attending Cedar Bluff High in the fall. Do I need to re-enroll him or is the transition automatic?

subject: Equity audit follow-up: family portal access at Roosevelt HS
description: The equity audit flagged access gaps at east-side buildings. Our family at Roosevelt HS still cannot log the classroom platform reliably. What is the district's follow-through timeline?

subject: East-side access — Cesar Chavez ES portal errors persist
description: My child at Cesar Chavez ES logs into the classroom portal three times a week to get assignments and it drops the session mid-lesson. Neighbors in Marshall Campus HS report the same. This is the east-side pattern the audit named.

subject: Bell schedule survey — where can I see the results?
description: I completed the Round 1 bell schedule survey in February. When will the district publish the family-vs-staff split so we can see what other parents said?

subject: Bell schedule change — impact on after-school pickup at Bridlemile ES
description: The proposed bell change would push dismissal at Bridlemile ES to 3:40 PM. That collides with the sibling pickup at the elementary. Please make sure this concern is in the survey summary.

subject: Mirai STEM cohort — is Cesar Chavez ES on the east-side rollout list?
description: We heard the Mirai STEM Initiative Cohort B will add east-side buildings. Is Cesar Chavez ES on that list? My child is in 7th grade and would benefit.

subject: Budget shortfall — will Woodstock ES lose the reading specialist?
description: The board's $4.8M shortfall conversation is making parents at Woodstock ES nervous about the reading specialist FTE. Please clarify what east-side supports are protected.

subject: Enrollment portal — Whitman ES rezoning question
description: The family portal shows my child assigned to Whitman ES but the rezoning letter said otherwise. Which is authoritative?

subject: Bus route to Cesar Chavez ES — safety concern at Elm & Pine
description: Route change dropped the stop at Elm and Pine. Kids walking to Cesar Chavez ES now cross an unmarked intersection. This is a repeat of last October's complaint.

subject: Classroom platform training — when is the Sitton ES session?
description: Teachers at Sitton ES still ask for the classroom platform onboarding. Is there a Cohort C training scheduled?

subject: Equity audit report — where is the public version?
description: The board promised a public equity audit summary by end of Q1. It has not posted. Can someone confirm the release window?

subject: Bell schedule — teacher planning-period impact at Alameda ES
description: As a teacher at Alameda ES, I need to know if the bell change protects the collaborative planning block. Please make sure staff feedback is not collapsed with family feedback.

subject: Classroom adoption at Powellhurst ES — Mirai overlap
description: Our Powellhurst ES is running the classroom platform alongside the Mirai STEM curriculum. Adoption rates look thin on the east side. What does the data actually say?

subject: Family portal down at Lents ES — third time this month
description: Family portal at Lents ES has been unavailable for 3 hours this morning. Third outage this month. East-side buildings keep taking the hit. Please escalate.

description: The last two family newsletters had no Vietnamese translation. Half the Rockwood ES families need it. Please restore the translation lineage.

description: Parents at Sitton ES are asking whether wraparound services survive the shortfall. The equity audit named these as the most fragile. Please answer.

description: The family portal shows my child assigned to Roosevelt HS but the rezoning letter said otherwise. Which is authoritative?

subject: Bus route to Bridger K-8 — safety concern at Elm & Pine
description: Route change dropped the stop at Elm and Pine. Kids walking to Bridger K-8 now cross an unmarked intersection. This is a repeat of last October's complaint.

subject: Classroom platform training — when is the Wilson HS session?
description: Teachers at Wilson HS still ask for the classroom platform onboarding. Is there a Cohort C training scheduled?

subject: Equity audit report — where is the public version?
description: The board promised a public equity audit summary by end of Q1. It has not posted. Can someone confirm the release window?
